cards.back: A set of objects, where each object is defined by a set of features or attributes that are used to identify it.
A set of objects, where no object is a subset of another object.
A set of objects, where every object is a subset of every other object.
A subgraph of a graph that has no edges connecting it to any other part of the graph.
A region of an image where there are no edges connecting it to any other region.
